name: king-of-open-play
description: Offline-first pickleball open-play organizer for web and Android.

scripts.android:sync: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-android-web.ps1 && cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-android-web.ps1 && cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
